alkylation reagent: derivatized by treatment with iodoacetamide to form stable carbamidomethyl derivatives
cleavage agent: digestion with trypsin were performed on selected gel bands
fragmentation method: with CID collision energy set at 35%
instrument: using an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
ionization type: eluate was ionized by electrospray ionization
reduction reagent: Cysteine residues were reduced with dithiothreitol
